title: Add proper UI layout and Loosefruit flow
description: Add Loosefruit controls to the Duplicate Cleanup tab, improve the layout for multiple cleanup sources, fetch all-location Loosefruit targets, validate sessions per LocCode, and start RunPayload(operation='delete_loosefruit').
convergence: Duplicate Cleanup tab shows distinct ADTRANS, Task Register, and Loosefruit sections without crowding the table.
Loosefruit fetch uses Query Gateway worker and renders targets in duplicate_table.
Dry run is checked by default.
Actual delete confirms selected target count and LocCode count.
Payload operation is delete_loosefruit and category_key is loosefruit.
loosefruit.* runner events update duplicate target rows and run log.
